title: RC234 Election or Revocation of an Election to Allow a Dealer to Claim Refunds of Federal Excise Tax on Goods Purchased or Imported by a Province - Canada.ca
content:
## RC234 Election or Revocation of an Election to Allow a Dealer to Claim Refunds of Federal Excise Tax on Goods Purchased or Imported by a Province
You must download the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use Acrobat Reader 10 or later to open the file. Do not click the link to open it in your web browser.
- Download and save the PDF to your computer
- Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later

## Ways to get the form
- Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher. Accessible Fillable PDF (rc234-fill-24e.pdf)

### Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader
You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher.
- Accessible Fillable PDF (rc234-fill-24e.pdf)
- Print and fill out by hand Standard print PDF (rc234-24e.pdf)

### Print and fill out by hand
- Standard print PDF (rc234-24e.pdf)
- Ask for an alternate format You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print. Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Ask for an alternate format
You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print.
- Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities
- ETSL80 Refund of Federal Excise Tax for Goods Purchased or Imported by a Province Without a Reciprocal Taxation Agreement With the Government of Canada
- RC230, Federal Excise Tax Exemption Certificate for Goods Purchased by a Province

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
